entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Staple cereal of the hottest, driest areas of the tropics and subtropics

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A regular occurrence in the tropics and subtropics that necessitates stress tolerance in crops

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: An essential attribute of new pearl millet cultivars to maintain productivity under drought

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions mapped for components of grain and stover yield and yield maintenance under terminal drought stress

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A component of yield evaluated under terminal drought stress and gradient stress

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: A component of yield mapped using quantitative trait loci

entities.name: YIELD MAINTENANCE
entities.description: The ability to maintain yield under terminal drought stress conditions

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A specific condition of drought stress occurring at the end of the growth cycle

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to improve stress tolerance in elite hybrid cultivars

entities.name: TOPCROSS HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids created using pollinators bred from lines selected directly from a mapping population

entities.name: TESTCROSS HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids used to evaluate QTL introgression lines against a drought-sensitive parent

entities.name: QTL INTROGRESSION LINES
entities.description: Lines created by transferring specific drought tolerance QTLs into a sensitive background

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A method used to introgress a putative major drought tolerance QTL into the H 77/833-2 background

entities.name: H 77/833-2
entities.description: A drought-sensitive parent of the mapping population used as a recurrent parent in backcrossing

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: A measure of the performance of QTL introgression lines for grain yield under terminal stress

entities.name: GRADIENT STRESS
entities.description: A type of stress evaluation used to compare QTL introgression lines with recurrent parents
